summary: Anthropic skills migration: analyzed 17 Anthropic + 23 Codi skills. Fixed scanSkills() to use **/SKILL.md glob (parser.ts). Plan approved: create 13 TS templates in src/templates/skills/, merge 3 overlaps (skill-creator, mcp-server-creator, documentation), register in index.ts + skill-template-loader.ts. Supplementary files go to .codi/skills/{name}/. Previous direct-copy approach was incorrect — must use template pipeline.
next_steps: Step 0: clean .codi/skills/ incorrect copies. Step 1: create 13 TS templates. Step 2: merge 3 existing templates. Step 3: register in index.ts + loader. Step 4: place supplementary files. Step 5: build + verify 36 skills in wizard.
